title: Regen Protocols
summary: Public Garden-supporting thread describing regenerative onchain protocols, capital flows, and steward support systems.
description: The Regen Protocols Hub thread is editorial context for Greenpill Garden. It frames onchain protocols as support infrastructure for stewards and regenerative initiatives without making them guild-owned projects.
